title: SimpleTech for Fabric
description: Stacks of dirt? Introducing: the Sieve!
body:
Stacks of dirt in your shed, but no use for it? Worry no more: the sieve will help! With some honest human labour, you can get all those valuable metals from every single dirt!

 

Stacks of netherrack filling your chests, but no use for it? Worry no more: the sieve will help! With some honest human labour, you can get all those valuable metals from every single netherrack!

Easy, simple and cheap: the Sieve is there for all your sieving-needs! With one easy recipe, you can own this amazing device yourself!

 

This mod contains:

  • String sieve: get those nuggets from the dirt!
  • Bio sieve: all the seeds!
  • Golden sieve: retrieve the rare redstones and diamonds
  • Nether sieve: get everything from the nether!
  • Auto sieve: a string-tiered automatic sieve. Just dump your dirt and wait
  • Golden Auto sieve: a gold-tiered automatic sieve.

 

How to set up the auto-sieve? Put a chest on the left (orange = input) and right (blue = output) side of the sieve. Insert dirt in the left, get bling from the right
